steps.t: Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire, can be found in central Câr Bronach. You should collect the stolen expedition supplies found at Tûr Fúar.
Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire, can be found in central Câr Bronach. You should collect the stolen expedition supplies found at Tûr Fúar.
Grúmachath can be found in central Câr Bronach. You should bring the expedition supplies to Grúmachath.
